commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=07881ffef8469e45a437b5ac33121af094c53a84)
commands.review_summary:
The PR delays Discord initial ack/status reactions until after inbound session recording, adds an optional channel-turn `afterRecord` hook, reuses existing Discord message threads before creating or skipping auto-threads, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +133. Total +170 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, not from a live run: current main queues the Discord ack before the shared channel-turn session recording step, and the PR adds tests for the intended order. I did not run a real Discord reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next step is contributor proof plus maintainer review of the small SDK mock gap; ClawSweeper repair should not run while real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: AGT-80 AGT-81 Fix Discord ingress ack ordering
target.body:
## Summary
- Queue Discord initial ack/status reactions only after inbound session recording succeeds.
- Add a generic channel-turn `afterRecord` lifecycle hook and wire Discord acking through it.
- Reuse existing Discord message threads before skipping bot-authored auto-thread creation, while preserving thread creation when the prefetch fails.
- Add regression coverage for accepted mention ingress ordering and auto-thread reuse/fallback behavior.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/turn/kernel.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/threading.auto-thread.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `~/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` initially found one P1 prefetch regression; fixed it and reran clean.

## Notes
- This ports the local installed-runtime AGT-80/AGT-81 hotfix into source.
- The acked-without-run watchdog query is not included here; this PR covers ordering and regression smoke, not the production detector.
target.author: mgunnin
